caption: A presentation slide displays two comparison columns titled "No Norm" and "Social Norm." Under "No Norm," a sign reads, "Please don't remove the petrified wood from the flora, in order to preserve the natural state of the Petrified Forest." Under "Social Norm," a sign reads, "Many past visitors have removed petrified wood from the park, changing the natural state of the Petrified Forest." Below these is a bar chart showing "% Stolen" across "Baseline," "No Norm," and "Social Norm" categories. As the presentation progresses, the top half is replaced by two new columns. The left column is titled "Anti-Litter Campaign" and features a sign that asks, "Did you know that cigarette butts are the most commonly littered item?" and includes a "DON'T TRASH CALIFORNIA" logo with an image of a landscape. The right column evolves from "Social Norm" to "Anti-Piracy Campaign," featuring a text box that states, "In Somalia over 60% of the young males are involved in piracy. Help us to keep your young boys safe by steering them away from piracy."
